description: Add comprehensive tests for the QuantLive component suite covering render states, accessibility, state transitions, and privacy indicators
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/__tests__/QuantLive.test.tsx - Test the main component: renders in idle state with orb button, activates on click (shows expanded view with captions/controls), deactivates on end session click, calls onActivate/onDeactivate callbacks, handles minimize/maximize, keyboard activation (Enter/Space on orb)

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/__tests__/QuantLiveOrb.test.tsx - Test orb: renders with correct aria-label for each color state, applies correct CSS classes per color state (check class names contain expected color), keyboard activation via Enter and Space keys, minimum size is 44x44 (check min-w-11 or w-11 class), disabled state

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/quant-live/__tests__/QuantLivePrivacyIndicator.test.tsx - Test privacy indicator: shows 'Mic on' when micActive=true, shows 'Camera on' when cameraActive=true, shows 'Screen shared' when screenSharing=true, hides indicators when all false, has z-[9999] class for always-on-top, role='status' for accessibility
acceptance_criteria: All test files exist and pass with vitest
Tests verify ARIA labels are present
Tests verify state transitions (idle -> active -> minimized -> idle)
Tests verify privacy indicator visibility based on props
No real audio/video APIs used (no mocking needed since components are pure UI)
